summary.name: RS SENTINEL
summary.remark_kiel:
Additional please inform authorities and pilots that vessel has obstruction on starboard side at midship :
-          Diving equipment about 7 m above sea level and 1.9m aside (frame=1.2m and diving basket=0.7m)
-          Survey pool about 0.4 m aside vessel.
Vessel requires port side alongside at locks and pilot boarding also on port side.

summary.name: SCANDIC
summary.remark_kiel:
vom Norden / Bitte das Schiff nicht mit in die Zulaufsteuerung aufnehmen, da es in Brunsbüttel in den Binnenhafen geht und somit
nicht in Brunsbüttel ausschleust.
